rationale: In the citing paper, Warren and Sorescu (2017) is used only as a supporting reference in Table 2 for a control-variable precedent (total assets). The main theory, hypotheses, and mediation framework center on customer (dis)satisfaction, short interest, and abnormal returns, with no substantive engagement of the cited paper's expectation-updating argument for new product announcements. There is no clear evidence that the citing study builds on, extends, or critiques that specific work beyond a peripheral literature listing role.
